channel.title: Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery Updates
channel.description: Official Sparkle updates for the Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery app.

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
Lofree Dongle Battery 1.0.5

  • Adds a charging indicator to the menu bar icon when the keyboard is charging.
  • Shows charging directly in the battery row as `Battery: <percent>% - Charging`.
  • Keeps the public release focused on the normal app experience without compatibility-debug tools.
